creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-11-23 11:56:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    benchmarks           Makefile 
  Added files:
    benchmarks/fhourstones Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    benchmarks/fhourstones/files patch-Makefile patch-fhourstones 
  Log:
  This integer benchmark solves positions in the game of connect-4,
  as played on a vertical 7x6 board.  This takes about 10 minutes
  on contemporary PCs.
  
  WWW:    http://homepages.cwi.nl/~tromp/c4/fhour.html
  
  PR:             ports/105778
  Submitted by:   trasz <trasz at pin.if.uz.zgora.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.54      +1 -0      ports/benchmarks/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/benchmarks/fhourstones/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/benchmarks/fhourstones/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/benchmarks/fhourstones/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/benchmarks/fhourstones/files/patch-fhourstones (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/benchmarks/fhourstones/pkg-descr (new)
